chunks.text: most people use UPS with the computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: like I am not using UPS now

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: UPS is an intractable power supply

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: UPS is necessary

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but the computer works without UPS

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: UPS is mainly used for safety and power backup

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: what you are seeing on the screen is UPS

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it is used for battery backup

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: suppose you are working on a computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and suddenly the light goes off

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the computer will shut down immediately without UPS

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and your work will not be saved

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if UPS is installed

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then it gives power to the computer for some time

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: with which you can save your work easily

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and close the computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: also if there is a voltage fluctuation in your house

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then UPS also saves the computer from being damaged

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: let's learn how to turn on the computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to run the computer, you need electric power

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: first of all, put the plug of the computer cabinet in the electric switchboard

chunks.text: if you have UPS

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then put the plug of the cabinet in the socket behind UPS

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now put the plug of UPS in the electric switchboard

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: are installed in the switchboard

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now we will turn on the main switch

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now after this we will turn on UPS

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: by pressing the power button on the front side of the switchboard

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: UPS will be turned on

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: after UPS is turned on

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we will turn on the computer cabinet

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: like I don't use UPS

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: so I have put the plug of monitor and computer cabinet

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in the electric switchboard

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we have to turn on the computer cabinet

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it is possible that the shape of the button in your cabinet

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.text: so now we will turn on this button

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the first screen that comes in front of you

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we call it desktop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in the background of the desktop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or the photo or design

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we call it wallpaper

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now look carefully at the screen

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: or the small arrow that you can see moving

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it is called mouse cursor or pointer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: when you move the mouse from your hand

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: on the table like this

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then this cursor also moves

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: exactly the same on the screen

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if we have to go anywhere on the screen

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then just by pulling the mouse in that direction

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we can reach there easily

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: mouse is not only used to go from one place to another

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but it is the most important tool to work on the computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: let's see some basic work of this

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if we have to select a file or folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then take the mouse cursor over that folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and press the left button once

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then it is called single click

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: see the folder has been highlighted

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it means the folder has been selected

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: after selecting the folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you press the enter key from the keyboard

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the folder will open

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the second most common way is

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: double click

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in this you press the left button of the mouse

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: quickly twice

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and the folder opens immediately

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: let's learn another fun and useful use of the mouse

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which is called dragging

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: dragging means

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: taking a file or folder from one place to another

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: first of all, bring the mouse cursor over that folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which has to be moved

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now press the left button of the mouse

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and keep pressing

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: do not leave

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: while pressing the button

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: drag the mouse to another place

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: as you can see on the screen

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the folder is also moving along

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: where you want to keep the folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: leave the mouse button there

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: this process is called drag and drop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now let's talk about the right mouse button

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the left button is not used as much

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but its work is very special and powerful

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: by right clicking

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the list that opens

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: is called context menu

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: context menu means

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: options according to the situation

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you right click on an empty place on the desktop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you will get an option like refresh view

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you right click on a file or folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you will get options like rename, delete, copy, properties

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: we will learn all these options in detail in the coming video

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now it is important to understand the concept

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: these small pictures or symbols on the screen

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: are called icons

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: its name is also written under each icon

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: friends, most of the icons on the desktop are shortcuts

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: shortcut means

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: a short and fast way to reach a software or folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you use a software like chrome, excel or word daily

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then making a shortcut on the desktop is very useful

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: so that you don't have to search inside to open the software

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: keep in mind one very important thing

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you delete a shortcut icon on the desktop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then the main software or data is not deleted

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: because it is just a shortcut

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the actual file remains safe inside the computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you can see carefully that the shortcut looks like this

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: friends, how to make a shortcut and how to delete it

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to add or remove a desktop icon

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: friends, after the desktop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now it is also very important to know about the laptop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: nowadays, whether it is an office, home or field work

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: there is a demand for a laptop everywhere

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the things we will learn in the course

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: will work on both the laptop and desktop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: so let's understand some important things about the laptop step by step

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: first of all, it is important to know

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to open the laptop properly

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: often people hold the laptop from the corner or side and open it

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which is completely wrong

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the laptop's hinks can break or break

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the laptop's screen should always be held from the center

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and should be lifted up slowly

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: this keeps the laptop safe

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: see this is a laptop of the size of a notebook

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: its screen is a little small

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and see carefully that on the right side of its keyboard

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: there is no numeric keypad

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: this laptop is very good for basic work, online class and daily use

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and this is a full-size laptop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it is a little heavy

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in this, the keyboard is exactly like a desktop keyboard

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: on the right side, there is a separate numeric pad

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: such laptops are more suitable for heavy software, 3D modeling, video editing or gaming

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in a desktop computer, the screen, keyboard and mouse are all different

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but in a laptop, the screen, keyboard and mouse are all adjusted at the same place

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: that's why the laptop is also called an all-in-one device

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: it may seem a little difficult to work on the touchpad in the beginning

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you want to increase your working speed

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can connect an external USB mouse and keyboard with the laptop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: just plug in the USB ports provided on the side of the laptop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and they will start working immediately

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the touchpad is replaced by the mouse in the laptop

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: if you want to move the cursor

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then just slide your finger on the touchpad

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: as my finger is moving

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the cursor is also moving

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: as we learned in the desktop computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to open a folder, double click is used

chunks.text: now if we want to open a folder from the touchpad of the laptop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: for this, we will take the cursor on that folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in one second, we will tap twice

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: tap tap, the folder will open

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now let's learn the most important and tricky work of the touchpad

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: let's learn dragging

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: to move a file from one place to another

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: bring the cursor on the folder

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: tap twice on the touchpad

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: do not lift your finger the second time

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: keep it pressed

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: now slide your finger

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: you can see the folder is being dragged

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: wherever you want to keep, remove your finger there

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: let's learn how to scroll with the touchpad

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: nowadays, two fingers are used to scroll on the laptop

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: keep two fingers on the touchpad

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and slide up and down

chunks.text: if you want me to come with a dedicated video on the laptop

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class

chunks.text: friends, now we will talk about the most important button of the computer

chunks.text: here you can see the icon like a window

chunks.text: this is called the start button

chunks.title: Class

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: because from here you control your entire computer

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: there are two simple ways to open the start menu

chunks.title: Class

important parts of the computer like hard disk, motherboard, RAM, SMPS I have already made a dedicated video on this computer cabinet in which we have told the external ports of the computer and the internal parts in detail if you have not seen that video yet then its link will be found in the description or you can also click on the I button above this is the monitor which we also call the looks a little different from this but the basic structure of all the mouse is almost the same mouse usually has two buttons and there is a scroll wheel in the middle the left side button of the mouse is called the left mouse button the right side button is called the right mouse button and in the middle it is called the scroll wheel with which we can scroll the page up and down in the next video if I say click or left click means left mouse button right click means right mouse button right click will always be called right click but left click is often called click this is the keyboard in this video we will not use the keyboard how to use the A to Z keys of the keyboard all this we will learn in detail in the coming video if you want to know about keyboard keys now then you will get the link of it in the description most people use UPS with the computer like I am not using UPS now UPS is an intractable power supply UPS is necessary but the computer works without UPS UPS is mainly used for safety and power backup what you are seeing on the screen is UPS it is used for battery backup suppose you are working on a computer and suddenly the light goes off then the computer will shut down immediately without UPS and your work will not be saved if UPS is installed then it gives power to the computer for some time with which you can save your work easily and close the computer also if there is a voltage fluctuation in your house then UPS also saves the computer from being damaged let's learn how to turn on the computer to run the computer, you need electric power first of all, put the plug of the computer cabinet in the electric switchboard if you have UPS then put the plug of the cabinet in the socket behind UPS now put the plug of UPS in the electric switchboard like the computer cabinet needs power similarly, the monitor also needs power put the plug of the monitor in the electric switchboard if you use two monitors then put the plug of both the monitors like I use two monitors now for multitasking big MNCs companies and offices often use dual monitor setup you can see the plugs of both the computer cabinet and monitor are installed in the switchboard now we will turn on the main switch now after this we will turn on UPS by pressing the power button on the front side of the switchboard UPS will be turned on after UPS is turned on we will turn on the computer cabinet like I don't use UPS so I have put the plug of monitor and computer cabinet in the electric switchboard so now I will turn on the computer cabinet then the computer will be turned on we have to turn on the computer cabinet press the power button of the cabinet it is possible that the shape of the button in your cabinet or the position is a little different as soon as you press the button indicator light starts flashing now we will turn on the monitor the power button of the monitor is in some monitors is in front and in some monitors is behind like in this monitor the power button is on the back so now we will turn on this button wait for a while computer will boot and your system will start properly as soon as the computer is turned on the first screen that comes in front of you we call it desktop in the background of the desktop or the photo or design we call it wallpaper now look carefully at the screen or the small arrow that you can see moving it is called mouse cursor or pointer when you move the mouse from your hand on the table like this then this cursor also moves exactly the same on the screen if we have to go anywhere on the screen then just by pulling the mouse in that direction we can reach there easily mouse is not only used to go from one place to another but it is the most important tool to work on the computer let's see some basic work of this if we have to select a file or folder then take the mouse cursor over that folder and press the left button once then it is called single click see the folder has been highlighted it means the folder has been selected after selecting the folder if you press the enter key from the keyboard then the folder will open the second most common way is double click in this you press the left button of the mouse quickly twice and the folder opens immediately let's learn another fun and useful use of the mouse which is called dragging dragging means taking a file or folder from one place to another first of all, bring the mouse cursor over that folder which has to be moved now press the left button of the mouse and keep pressing do not leave while pressing the button drag the mouse to another place as you can see on the screen the folder is also moving along where you want to keep the folder leave the mouse button there this process is called drag and drop now let's talk about the right mouse button the left button is not used as much but its work is very special and powerful by right clicking the list that opens is called context menu context menu means options according to the situation if you right click on an empty place on the desktop then you will get an option like refresh view if you right click on a file or folder then you will get options like rename, delete, copy, properties we will learn all these options in detail in the coming video now it is important to understand the concept these small pictures or symbols on the screen are called icons its name is also written under each icon friends, most of the icons on the desktop are shortcuts shortcut means a short and fast way to reach a software or folder if you use a software like chrome, excel or word daily then making a shortcut on the desktop is very useful so that you don't have to search inside to open the software keep in mind one very important thing if you delete a shortcut icon on the desktop then the main software or data is not deleted because it is just a shortcut the actual file remains safe inside the computer you can see carefully that the shortcut looks like this friends,
